sentence: Your gringbro will carry one end of the brarpet without being asked.

wombos.definition: A carpet or shared household item jointly purchased with a friend in a roommate situation — it belongs to both of you equally. A symbol of bro-cohabitation.
A gringo who is also undeniably your bro — a foreign or out-of-place friend who has fully earned their spot in the crew.
wombos.example: He's from Ohio but he's been my gringbro since college.
